creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I checked, the file:
 
files/patch-src_Makefile.in
            
is not needed anymore. the patch contained in it was included
upstream and the distfile rerolled.
                        
I'm attaching a new patchset. Sorry for not noticing beforehand.

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
